notes: Tracker sync uses final-only historical rows.
DR Picks, K Props, and HR picks are auto-snapshotted if data/today-predictions.json is missing rows for the day.
K Props are graded from final boxscore strikeouts. HR picks are graded from final boxscore home runs.
Tracker rows are deduplicated by game/player identity on every run to prevent workflow reruns from double-counting results.
